articles.title: BITCOIN'S BREAKOUT STALLS AS OVERHEAD SUPPLY CAPS GAINS
articles.summary: Glassnode shows BTC's early January breakout fizzled as the price failed to clear a dense band of breakeven-level supply near $98,000. While onchain metrics and subdued derivatives activity suggest consolidation in a low-participation market rather than a decisive bear turn, fragile macro conditions and nearly $1 billion in combined spot ETF outflows mean upside needs stronger, broad-based demand to absorb the overhead supply.

articles.title: FARCASTER ACQUIRED BY NEYNAR AFTER FOUNDERS PIVOT
LASER DIGITAL LAUNCHES TOKENIZED BITCOIN YIELD FUND
articles.summary: Nomura's crypto subsidiary, Laser Digital, launched the Bitcoin Diversified Yield Fund SP (BDYF), the world's first natively tokenized Cayman-domiciled Bitcoin yield fund targeting institutional and accredited investors. The fund aims to generate over 5% excess net returns above Bitcoin performance through market-neutral strategies, including arbitrage, lending, and options, while maintaining long-only BTC exposure with institutional-grade risk controls. Unlike traditional tokenized fund structures that use SPVs or feeder funds, BDYF issues tokenized share classes directly at the main fund level, enabling true on-chain ownership alongside traditional shares.

articles.title: WALLETCONNECT ADDS TRON TO 600+ WALLETS AND 70,000 DAPPS
articles.summary: WalletConnect now supports TRON, giving 600+ WalletConnect-enabled wallets and 70,000 dApps direct TRC-20 stablecoin access and native DeFi/NFT integrations. The partnership leverages TRON's USDT throughput (an estimated $7.9 trillion in 2025 and about $21 billion in stablecoin transfers per day) to broaden fast, low-cost cross-border, merchant, and institutional payments via existing custodians and integrations like Ingenico without extra developer work.

articles.title: PRIVACY ELITE: THE MUST-FOLLOW PRIVACY & SECURITY LIST
articles.summary: A curated “Privacy Elite” roster that groups top privacy architects, researchers, OPSEC operators, and practical guides into a single follow-list. It offers a shortcut to high-signal accounts for anyone tracking privacy and security developments in crypto.

articles.title: ARK INVEST ON CRYPTO'S NEXT GROWTH PHASE
articles.summary: ARK Invest projects the digital asset market could reach $28 trillion by 2030, with Bitcoin capturing approximately 70% market share at roughly $16 trillion, as institutional adoption accelerates with US ETFs and public companies now holding 12% of total supply (up from 8.7% in early 2025) while demonstrating historically shallow drawdowns. DeFi applications generated a record $3.8 billion in revenue during 2025, with ultra-efficient platforms like Hyperliquid achieving $800 million annually with under 15 employees, while tokenized assets tripled to $19 billion and could expand to $11 trillion by 2030. Regulatory clarity remains the critical factor that will determine whether these growth projections translate to mainstream adoption.

articles.title: CONVEX AND CONCAVE DISPOSITIONS
articles.summary: Vitalik Buterin introduces a decision-making framework that distinguishes "concave disposition" (favoring compromise/middle ground) from "convex disposition" (favoring commitment to extremes), using Bitcoin's all-or-nothing approach to decentralization versus Ethereum's pragmatic willingness to accept tradeoffs as primary examples. He argues most real-world decisions are multidimensional "saddle points" that are simultaneously convex in some dimensions and concave in others, meaning effective protocol design requires identifying which aspects demand purity versus which benefit from balance. The framework challenges the crypto industry's tendency toward single-dimensional thinking in governance debates.

articles.title: PANTERA BLOCKCHAIN LETTER: MARKET OUTLOOK 2026
articles.summary: 2025 was a macro and flows-driven year rather than fundamentals-driven, with crypto markets experiencing historic stress culminating in an October 10 liquidation cascade that exceeded $20 billion in notional positions – larger than both Terra/Luna and FTX unwinding events. Performance data revealed extreme market concentration with Bitcoin declining 6% while the median token in the top 400 fell 79%, and the broader altcoin basket (excluding BTC/ETH/SOL) dropping 59%. Market dynamics were attributed to positioning effects, policy developments, including the US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve announcement and GENIUS Act, and Federal Reserve rate decisions.

articles.title: CAROLINE ELLISON RELEASED FROM PRISON
articles.summary: Caroline Ellison, former Alameda Research CEO, was released from federal prison on January 21 after serving approximately 14 months of her two-year sentence due to good conduct and cooperation with authorities.

articles.title: ETHEREUM'S VOLATILE PRICE VS. STABLECOINS' STEADY CLIMB
articles.summary: Over the past three years, both ETH's market cap and the stablecoin market cap on Ethereum have risen by roughly 100%, but through very different paths.

articles.title: USDC DOMINATES CRYPTO PAYROLLS AS BUSINESSES FAVOR STABILITY
articles.summary: USDC accounts for roughly 63% of all crypto payroll payments, ahead of USDT at 28.6%, highlighting a clear preference among businesses.

articles.title: AAVE V4'S REINVESTMENT MODULE
articles.summary: Aave v4's Reinvestment Module routes idle lender capital through the Liquidity Hub into low-risk external yield strategies and continuously rebalances so lenders earn additional, automated yield while liquidity remains instantly available when borrowing demand returns.
